name: Linux-Kodachi
desc: Linux Kodachi is a Debian-based security OS by Warith Al Maawali, built for uncompromising privacy, anonymity, and reliability. It pairs hardened defaults with…
descFull: Linux Kodachi is a Debian-based security OS by Warith Al Maawali, built for uncompromising privacy, anonymity, and reliability. It pairs hardened defaults with a curated toolkit for private browsing, advanced networking, and incident response, all in an intuitive interface.
